# Multan Chemicals Limited (MCL) — Full Reference

> Multan Chemicals Limited is an industrial and medical gas manufacturer and supplier based in Multan, Pakistan, established in 1985. MCL produces and supplies Industrial Gases, Medical Gases, and Speciality Gases, and provides healthcare engineering services including Medical Gas Pipeline Systems (MGPS), modular operating theatres, and clinical/diagnostic gas delivery systems, serving hospitals, factories, laboratories, and industrial facilities across Pakistan. Audience: procurement managers, operations managers, lab managers, and industrial buyers.

## Company facts

- Founded: 1985 (40+ years of operation)
- Oxygen plant capacity: 125 TPD (tonnes per day)
- Cylinder capacity: 87,000+
- Fleet: 65+ trucks, 20+ tanker trucks, 100+ dedicated logistics staff
- Filling stations: 35+ nationwide
- Authorized distributors: 30+
- Clients served: 1000+
- MGPS projects completed: 100+ (25+ years of MGPS experience), connected to 50,000+ hospital beds

## Certifications

- Halal Certification — ACTS Halal Certification & Training Services (covers production, filling and supply of medical, industrial and specialty gases at the Industrial Estate, Multan facility)
- ISO 45001:2018 (occupational health & safety) — Bureau Veritas
- FSSC 22000 (food safety) — Bureau Veritas
- ISO 14001:2015 (environmental management) — Bureau Veritas
- Medical oxygen purity exceeds European Pharmacopeia 1999 standards
- Compliance frameworks referenced: GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice), HTM 02-01 and HTM 2022 (Medical Gas Pipeline Systems), NFPA 99 (Health Care Facilities Code)

- [Medical Oxygen](https://mcl-gases.com/gases/medical-gases/oxygen)

- Medical Gas Pipelines (MGPS) — [MGPS Solutions](https://mcl-gases.com/mgps-solutions)
- Terminal Units
- Gas Delivery systems
- Modular Operating Theatres — [Modular OT](https://mcl-gases.com/modular-ot)
- Diagnostic Systems — [Clinical Systems](https://mcl-gases.com/clinical-systems)
- Critical Care equipment
- Therapeutic equipment
